_note: The owner's macro->sector links (captured 2026-07-10/11 night), seeded as hand-authored PRIORS for the Phase-3 sector macro layer (docs/HOLY_GRAIL_PLAN.md 6.3). Each link is a hypothesis the proving harness must validate from outcomes before it earns veto/scoring power — never trusted blindly (decision #50's lesson). direction_when_driver_rises: +1 = sector tailwind, -1 = headwind. Edit freely, no code change needed.

links.rationale: India imports ~85% of its oil: rising crude squeezes oil-marketing margins, paint/tyre input costs, and aviation fuel bills; falling crude is their tailwind.
Rupee weakness inflates exporters' rupee earnings (IT services, pharma); rupee strength compresses them.

links.driver_definition: gold rising AND VIX rising together, or a broad market fall
links.rationale: Owner's tell (2026-07-11): in a falling market institutional money doesn't exit, it ROTATES - FMCG is the defensive parking lot ('the liquid amounts have to be invested somewhere'). Two-sided: risk-off = FMCG relative strength / inflow; risk appetite returning = rotation back OUT of FMCG into cyclicals is itself a signal.
Gold+VIX rising together = regime caution on aggressive/high-beta long setups (the veto side of the same rotation).

links.driver_definition: US close direction + GIFT-Nifty gap indication
links.rationale: US overnight moves + GIFT Nifty set the open; certain setups only work on gap-up vs gap-down days - a per-setup conditioning variable, not a sector rotation.
